regions.text: A bank teller must keep complete records of money taken in and given out to make certain accounts are in order. Banking is important business.
A bank must keep accounts in good order and make true statements. (Statement shows columns for OUT, IN, DATE, NO., and BALANCE).
in order: with nothing wrong; in the right place. An ill man’s body is 'out of order'. Police help keep law and order.
making certain: proving to oneself and others.
